title: Gin's Wheat
description: A subjective take on the Wheat family, de-neon-ifying earlier stages and redesigning later ones.
body:
**For 10 Years, I have been tormented by those neon-green wheat saplings. No more! I did something about it.**

This pack reshades every stage to better fit the style of other crops like Carrots and Potatoes so they don't stick out so badly. Each stage in order is progressively more tweaked from the original textures, but the last two stages are entirely redesigned from scratch. The last two are also tall, like in [Stay True](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/stay-true-4447380/), but not by much. This means that the pack is incompatible with model swapping packs like [Flora Formae](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flora-formae).![The 8 stages of Wheat in this Resource Pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4edd1a8615b9b68408772edf3c06d8628975ead.png)
More on the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gins-wheat/gallery).
